data.title: Paxos Labs raises $12M for Amplify crypto yield platform, expanding services with single SDK integration, led by Blockchain Capital.
data.description: Paxos Labs is expanding its Amplify platform by offering yield, lending, and stablecoin services through a single SDK integration. Blockchain Capital is leading the funding round for this expansion. The platform aims to provide a comprehensive range of services under one umbrella for blockchain users. This move comes as Paxos Labs looks to streamline the user experience and offer a more cohesive solution. The integration will allow users to access these services seamlessly, with Blockchain Capital's support ensuring the success of this expansion.

data.title: Telix Successfully Prices and Upsizes US$600 Million Convertible Bonds
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (ASX: TLX, NASDAQ: TLX) has announced the successful pricing and increase in size of its 1.50% convertible notes due 2031. The company, based in Melbourne, Australia and Indianapolis, revealed the issuance by its wholly-owned subsidiary. The convertible notes are set to provide financial support for Telix, a leading healthcare provider. This move signifies a positive growth for the company in the financial sector.

data.title: BRP Suspends FY27 Guidance Due to Changes to U.S. Tariff Environment
data.description: On April 14, 2026, BRP Inc. (TSX: DOO) (NASDAQ: DOO) based in Valcourt, QC, revealed that they are halting their full-year FY27 guidance due to the alteration of Section 232 tariffs on Steel, Aluminum, and Copper imports to the U.S. The amendment, enacted on April 6, 2026, has prompted this decision.

data.title: New Richmond American Community Debuting in Santa Clarita
data.description: Valencia's Lumin development is set to introduce a diverse range of new homes in the area. Richmond American Homes of Maryland, Inc., a California Department of Real Estate-licensed Real Estate Broker with Corporation License Number 01842595 and a subsidiary of Sekisui House, is leading this initiative. The development is expected to result in a significant increase in residential options in Valencia.

data.title: Atkore Inc. Announces Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Atkore Inc., a prominent manufacturer of electrical products for various applications, is set to announce its Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, before the market opens. The company, listed under NYSE as ATKR, will conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (ET) on the same day to discuss these results. Investors and other stakeholders can tune in to a webcast of the live conference for insights.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Win Streak Hits 10 Days As Nvidia, Google Flash Buy Signals; What To Do Now
data.description: The recent surge in the stock market continues as the Nasdaq and Nvidia have been on the rise for 10 consecutive days. Investors should now keep an eye on upcoming earnings reports from ASML and Bank of America. Additionally, Dow Jones Futures are showing a positive outlook - with the Nasdaq securing its 10-day winning streak and signals indicating strong buys for Nvidia and Google. This information provides valuable insights for investors seeking guidance on their next steps in the market.

data.title: Five Star Bancorp Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Webcast
data.description: RANCHO CORDOVA, California, April 14, 2026 - On Monday, April 27, 2026, Five Star Bancorp (FSBC) plans to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, ending on March 31. The company, operating primarily through its subsidiary Five Star Bank, will announce these results post the stock market closure.

data.title: $142K Grant from FHLB Dallas and First Federal Bank of Louisiana Enables Nonprofit to Help Louisiana Homeowners Resolve Property Ownership Issues
data.description: In Lake Charles, Louisiana, a Pathway Fund grant of $142,401 has been awarded by the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) through First Federal Bank of Louisiana. The grant will greatly enhance Project Build a Future’s (PBAF) efforts to assist families in addressing heirs’ property issues, resolving title disputes, and safeguarding generational wealth in Calcasieu Parish. Officials from both banks recently participated in a check presentation with PBAF to mark the grant's allocation.

data.title: WLFI's stock could fall by 20% due to 'LUNA 2.0' accusations. They reportedly borrowed $75 million using illiquid tokens, raising concerns.
data.description: World Liberty Financial is reported to have borrowed $75 million using illiquid tokens, sparking concerns about bad debt and causing unease among traders.

data.title: Rockwell Automation Declares Quarterly Dividend at $1.38 Per Share on Common Stock
data.description: Milwaukee-based Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) has announced a quarterly dividend of $1.38 per share for its common stock. The dividend will be payable on June 10, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 18, 2026. Rockwell Automation is a prominent player in industrial automation and digital transformation on a global scale. They specialize in connecting human creativity with technological innovation to drive growth and efficiency in various industries.

data.title: LocaliQ ANZ Launches AI Voice Agent to Help Businesses Capture and Convert Every Call
data.description: In Sydney, Australia, LocaliQ ANZ, a digital marketing solutions arm of USA TODAY Co., introduced its advanced AI Voice Agent as part of Dash by LocaliQ, an AI-driven lead management platform. The AI Voice Agent aims to enhance businesses' ability to capture, handle, and convert inquiries in real time. This new feature builds upon the existing functionalities of Dash and enables seamless voice interactions, providing businesses with a competitive advantage in engaging with customers round the clock.

data.title: Wagner Reese Files Civil Suit Following 12-Count Conviction in Assault of Non-Verbal Child on Jennings County School Bus
data.description: In Carmel, Indiana, on April 14, 2026, lawyers Laura Swafford and Stephen Wagner from Wagner Reese, LLP are providing legal representation for a family dealing with the case of their 7-year-old non-verbal special needs child. The child was subjected to multiple incidents of sexual assault in March and April of 2025 by an older student while in transit.

data.title: Starco Brands Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, Starco Brands, Inc. (OTCQB: STCB) disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluded on December 31, 2025. Chairman & CEO, Ross Sklar, emphasized that 2025 showcased positive outcomes including margin growth, portfolio distribution alignment, and expansion through innovation. Sklar noted the company's commitment to optimizing the portfolio, cutting costs, enhancing profitability, and introducing innovative products, all of which were successfully achieved during the period.
